sections.paragraph: with suffix רִשְׁעִי masc. wickedness, unrighteousness, Psa 5:5 45:8 and frequently. Opp. to צֶדֶק. אֹצְרֹות רֶשַׁע wealth wickedly acquired, Mic 6:10. מֹאזְנֵי רֶשַׁע wicked, i.e. deceitful, fraudulent balances, Mic 6:11. Specially, used for fraud, falsehood, Pro 8:7 (opp. to אֱמֶת). Plur. רְשָׁעִים things done wickedly, Job 34:26.
